export class ImageToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(images, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);

        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        const toReturn = [];
        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims]
            const output = await this.model.generate({ inputs: batch, ...generate_kwargs });
            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
                skip_special_tokens: true,
            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))
            toReturn.push(decoded);
        }

        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
    }
}
```

 *

 * ```javascript
 * const qa_pipeline = await pipeline('document-question-answering', 'Xenova/donut-base-finetuned-docvqa');
 * const image = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/invoice.png';
 * const question = 'What is the invoice number?';

export class DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(image, question, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // NOTE: For now, we only support a batch size of 1

        // Preprocess image
        const preparedImage = (await prepareImages(image))[0];
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImage);

        // Run tokenization
        const task_prompt = `<s_docvqa><s_question>${question}</s_question><s_answer>`;
        const decoder_input_ids = this.tokenizer(task_prompt, {
            add_special_tokens: false,
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        }).input_ids;

        // Run model
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            inputs: pixel_values,
            // @ts-expect-error TS2339
            max_length: this.model.config.decoder.max_position_embeddings,
            decoder_input_ids,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode output
        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output))[0];

        // Parse answer
        const match = decoded.match(/<s_answer>(.*?)<\/s_answer>/);
        let answer = null;
        if (match && match.length >= 2) {
            answer = match[1].trim();
        }
        return [{ answer }];
    }
}
```

export class ImageToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(images, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);

        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        const toReturn = [];
        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims]
            const output = await this.model.generate({ inputs: batch, ...generate_kwargs });
            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
                skip_special_tokens: true,
            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }))
            toReturn.push(decoded);
        }

        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
    }
}
```

export class DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(image, question, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        // NOTE: For now, we only support a batch size of 1

        // Preprocess image
        const preparedImage = (await prepareImages(image))[0];
        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImage);

        // Run tokenization
        const task_prompt = `<s_docvqa><s_question>${question}</s_question><s_answer>`;
        const decoder_input_ids = this.tokenizer(task_prompt, {
            add_special_tokens: false,
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        }).input_ids;

        // Run model
        const output = await this.model.generate({
            inputs: pixel_values,
            // @ts-expect-error TS2339
            max_length: this.model.config.decoder.max_position_embeddings,
            decoder_input_ids,
            ...generate_kwargs,
        });

        // Decode output
        const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output))[0];

        // Parse answer
        const match = decoded.match(/<s_answer>(.*?)<\/s_answer>/);
        let answer = null;
        if (match && match.length >= 2) {
            answer = match[1].trim();
        }
        return [{ answer }];
    }
}
```

export class AutoProcessor {

    /** @type {typeof Processor.from_pretrained} */
    static async from_pretrained(pretrained_model_name_or_path, options={}) {

        // TODO: first check for processor.json 
        const preprocessorConfig = await getModelJSON(pretrained_model_name_or_path, IMAGE_PROCESSOR_NAME, true, options);

        const { image_processor_type, feature_extractor_type, processor_class } = preprocessorConfig;
        if (processor_class && AllProcessors[processor_class]) {

# Plan: Add `image-text-to-text` Pipeline to Transformers.js

## Context

Transformers.js supports a variety of pipeline tasks. This plan adds a new `ImageTextToTextPipeline` for multimodal models (like LLava, Florence-2, Qwen2-VL, PaliGemma, etc.) that accept both an image and a text prompt and generate a text response. These models are already supported at the model layer via `AutoModelForImageTextToText` (defined in `src/models.js`, maps to 11 model architectures). The pipeline layer is the only missing piece.

**Primary reference pipelines:** `ImageToTextPipeline` (lines 1975–2005) and `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` (lines 2732–2779) in `src/pipelines.js`.

---

## Critical File

**`src/pipelines.js`** — all 4 changes are in this one file.

---

## Step-by-Step Implementation

### Step 1 — Add import for `AutoModelForImageTextToText` (line ~43)

In the `import { ... } from './models.js'` block (lines 20–45), add `AutoModelForImageTextToText` after `AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction`:

```js
// Before (line 43-44):
    AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,
    PreTrainedModel,
} from './models.js';

// After:
    AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,
    AutoModelForImageTextToText,
    PreTrainedModel,
} from './models.js';
```

---

### Step 2 — Add JSDoc typedefs/callback + class definition (after line 2005)

Insert the new pipeline immediately after the closing `}` of `ImageToTextPipeline` (line 2005), before the `ImageClassificationPipeline` typedef block that starts at line 2007.

#### 2a. Typedefs and callback

```js
/**
 * @typedef {Object} ImageTextToTextSingle
 * @property {string} generated_text The generated text.
 * @typedef {ImageTextToTextSingle[]} ImageTextToTextOutput
 *
 * @callback ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback Process an image with a text prompt.
 * @param {ImagePipelineInputs} images The images to be processed.
 * @param {string} text The text prompt to use when processing the image.
 * @param {Partial<import('./generation/configuration_utils.js').GenerationConfig>} [options] Additional keyword arguments to pass along to the generate method of the model.
 * @returns {Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput|ImageTextToTextOutput[]>} An object (or array of objects) containing the generated text(s).
 *
 * @typedef {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs & ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback & Disposable} ImageTextToTextPipelineType
 */
```

#### 2b. Class-level JSDoc

```js
/**
 * Image-text-to-text pipeline using any `AutoModelForImageTextToText`. This pipeline accepts an
 * image and a text prompt, and generates a text response (e.g., a description, answer, or caption).
 *
 * **Example:** Describe an image with `onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft`.
 * ```javascript
 * const pipe = await pipeline('image-text-to-text', 'onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft');
 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/cats.jpg';
 * const output = await pipe(url, 'Describe this image in detail');
 * // [{ generated_text: 'Two cats are lying on a couch.' }]
 * ```
 */
```

#### 2c. Class definition

```js
export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(images, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);

        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        const text_inputs = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        const toReturn = [];
        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims];
            const output = await this.model.generate({
                inputs: text_inputs.input_ids,
                pixel_values: batch,
                ...generate_kwargs,
            });
            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
                skip_special_tokens: true,
            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));
            toReturn.push(decoded);
        }

        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
    }
}
```

**Notes on `_call` design:**
- Follows `ImageToTextPipeline`'s batching pattern (iterates over `pixel_values`, adds batch dim with `[1, ...batch.dims]`)
- Uses `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` (already defined, provides `model`, `tokenizer`, and `processor` on `this`)
- `inputs: text_inputs.input_ids` passes the text tokens as the primary `generate()` input; `pixel_values: batch` is an extra kwarg forwarded to the model's forward pass — the pattern used by all `ImageTextToText` model architectures (LLava, Florence-2, etc.)
- Decodes with `skip_special_tokens: true` and trims whitespace, matching `ImageToTextPipeline`

---

### Step 3 — Add entry to `SUPPORTED_TASKS` (after line 3255)

Insert after the `"image-to-text"` block (which ends at line 3255), before the `"image-classification"` entry:

```js
"image-text-to-text": {
    "tokenizer": AutoTokenizer,
    "pipeline": ImageTextToTextPipeline,
    "model": AutoModelForImageTextToText,
    "processor": AutoProcessor,
    "default": {
        "model": "onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft",
    },
    "type": "multimodal",
},
```

---

### Step 4 — Add to pipeline factory JSDoc list (line ~3427)

In the `@param {T} task` JSDoc block of the `pipeline()` function (lines 3418–3440), add the new entry in alphabetical order between `"image-segmentation"` and `"object-detection"`:

```js
 *  - `"image-text-to-text"`: will return a `ImageTextToTextPipeline`.
```

Full sorted context around the insertion:
```js

 *  - `"image-text-to-text"`: will return a `ImageTextToTextPipeline`.   ← INSERT HERE
 *  - `"image-to-text"`: will return a `ImageToTextPipeline`.
 *  - `"object-detection"`: will return a `ObjectDetectionPipeline`.
```

---

## Reused Utilities & Patterns

| Item | Source | Used for |
|---|---|---|
| `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` | `src/pipelines.js` line ~211 | Constructor typedef (model + tokenizer + processor) |
| `prepareImages()` | `src/pipelines.js` (private helper) | Normalize image inputs to `RawImage[]` |
| `AutoTokenizer` | already imported line 17 | Tokenize text prompt + decode output |
| `AutoProcessor` | already imported line 47 | Process images to `pixel_values` |
| `AutoModelForImageTextToText` | `src/models.js` line 8736 | **New import needed** |
| `ImageToTextPipeline` batching loop | lines 1993–2001 | Pattern for iterating `pixel_values` |
| `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` tokenization | lines 2749–2756 | Pattern for tokenizer call + forwarding to generate |

---

## Verification

1. **Import check:** Confirm `AutoModelForImageTextToText` appears in the import block from `./models.js`.

# Plan: Add `image-text-to-text` Pipeline to Transformers.js

## Context

Transformers.js supports a variety of pipeline tasks. This plan adds a new `ImageTextToTextPipeline` for multimodal models (like LLava, Florence-2, Qwen2-VL, PaliGemma, etc.) that accept both an image and a text prompt and generate a text response. These models are already supported at the model layer via `AutoModelForImageTextToText` (defined in `src/models.js`, maps to 11 model architectures). The pipeline layer is the only missing piece.

**Primary reference pipelines:** `ImageToTextPipeline` (lines 1975–2005) and `DocumentQuestionAnsweringPipeline` (lines 2732–2779) in `src/pipelines.js`.

---

## Critical File

**`src/pipelines.js`** — all 4 changes are in this one file.

---

## Step-by-Step Implementation

### Step 1 — Add import for `AutoModelForImageTextToText` (line ~43)

In the `import { ... } from './models.js'` block (lines 20–45), add `AutoModelForImageTextToText` after `AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction`:

```js
// Before (line 43-44):
    AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,
    PreTrainedModel,
} from './models.js';

// After:
    AutoModelForImageFeatureExtraction,
    AutoModelForImageTextToText,
    PreTrainedModel,
} from './models.js';
```

---

### Step 2 — Add JSDoc typedefs/callback + class definition (after line 2005)

Insert the new pipeline immediately after the closing `}` of `ImageToTextPipeline` (line 2005), before the `ImageClassificationPipeline` typedef block that starts at line 2007.

#### 2a. Typedefs and callback

```js
/**
 * @typedef {Object} ImageTextToTextSingle
 * @property {string} generated_text The generated text.
 * @typedef {ImageTextToTextSingle[]} ImageTextToTextOutput
 *
 * @callback ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback Process an image with a text prompt.
 * @param {ImagePipelineInputs} images The images to be processed.
 * @param {string} text The text prompt to use when processing the image.
 * @param {Partial<import('./generation/configuration_utils.js').GenerationConfig>} [options] Additional keyword arguments to pass along to the generate method of the model.
 * @returns {Promise<ImageTextToTextOutput|ImageTextToTextOutput[]>} An object (or array of objects) containing the generated text(s).
 *
 * @typedef {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs & ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback & Disposable} ImageTextToTextPipelineType
 */
```

#### 2b. Class-level JSDoc

```js
/**
 * Image-text-to-text pipeline using any `AutoModelForImageTextToText`. This pipeline accepts an
 * image and a text prompt, and generates a text response (e.g., a description, answer, or caption).
 *
 * **Example:** Describe an image with `onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft`.
 * ```javascript
 * const pipe = await pipeline('image-text-to-text', 'onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft');
 * const url = 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/Xenova/transformers.js-docs/resolve/main/cats.jpg';
 * const output = await pipe(url, 'Describe this image in detail');
 * // [{ generated_text: 'Two cats are lying on a couch.' }]
 * ```
 */
```

#### 2c. Class definition

```js
export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(images, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);

        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        const text_inputs = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        const toReturn = [];
        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims];
            const output = await this.model.generate({
                inputs: text_inputs.input_ids,
                pixel_values: batch,
                ...generate_kwargs,
            });
            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
                skip_special_tokens: true,
            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));
            toReturn.push(decoded);
        }

        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
    }
}
```

**Notes on `_call` design:**
- Follows `ImageToTextPipeline`'s batching pattern (iterates over `pixel_values`, adds batch dim with `[1, ...batch.dims]`)
- Uses `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` (already defined, provides `model`, `tokenizer`, and `processor` on `this`)
- `inputs: text_inputs.input_ids` passes the text tokens as the primary `generate()` input; `pixel_values: batch` is an extra kwarg forwarded to the model's forward pass — the pattern used by all `ImageTextToText` model architectures (LLava, Florence-2, etc.)
- Decodes with `skip_special_tokens: true` and trims whitespace, matching `ImageToTextPipeline`

---

### Step 3 — Add entry to `SUPPORTED_TASKS` (after line 3255)

Insert after the `"image-to-text"` block (which ends at line 3255), before the `"image-classification"` entry:

"image-text-to-text": {

    "processor": AutoProcessor,
    "default": {
        "model": "onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft",
    },

},

#### 2c. Class definition

```js
export class ImageTextToTextPipeline extends (/** @type {new (options: TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs) => ImageTextToTextPipelineType} */ (Pipeline)) {

    /**
     * Create a new ImageTextToTextPipeline.
     * @param {TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs} options An object used to instantiate the pipeline.
     */
    constructor(options) {
        super(options);
    }

    /** @type {ImageTextToTextPipelineCallback} */
    async _call(images, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {

        const isBatched = Array.isArray(images);
        const preparedImages = await prepareImages(images);

        const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImages);

        const text_inputs = this.tokenizer(text, {
            padding: true,
            truncation: true,
        });

        const toReturn = [];
        for (const batch of pixel_values) {
            batch.dims = [1, ...batch.dims];
            const output = await this.model.generate({
                inputs: text_inputs.input_ids,
                pixel_values: batch,
                ...generate_kwargs,
            });
            const decoded = this.tokenizer.batch_decode(/** @type {Tensor} */(output), {
                skip_special_tokens: true,
            }).map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));
            toReturn.push(decoded);
        }

        return isBatched ? toReturn : toReturn[0];
    }
}
```

**Notes on `_call` design:**
- Follows `ImageToTextPipeline`'s batching pattern (iterates over `pixel_values`, adds batch dim with `[1, ...batch.dims]`)
- Uses `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` (already defined, provides `model`, `tokenizer`, and `processor` on `this`)
- `inputs: text_inputs.input_ids` passes the text tokens as the primary `generate()` input; `pixel_values: batch` is an extra kwarg forwarded to the model's forward pass — the pattern used by all `ImageTextToText` model architectures (LLava, Florence-2, etc.)
- Decodes with `skip_special_tokens: true` and trims whitespace, matching `ImageToTextPipeline`
